(D) Moving anti-clockwise, the pattern is as follows
15 + 1 = 16
16 + 2 = 18
18 + 3 = 21
and 21 + 4 = 25
So, missing number 25 + 5 = 30
Hence, the answer is option (b).

(D) The pattern in clockwise direction
2 ×2→ 4 ×4→ 16 ×16→ 256
∴ ? = 4

(D) Here, the pattern is as follows
14 + 6 = 20
Similarly, 18 + 7 = 25
Hence, the answer is option (b).

(D) Here, the pattern is as follows
6 + 1 = 7
Similarly, 3 + ? = 6
⇒ ? = 6 - 3
or ? = 3
Hence, the answer is option (d).

(D) As, 7 + 2 = 9, 9 × 4 = 36
6 + 8 = 14, 14 × 3 = 42
Similarly, 9 + 4 = 13 and 13 × 2 = 26
Hence, number 2 will come in place of question mark.

(D) Pattern given in figure is as follows
5 × 2 + 2 = 12, 12 × 2 + 2 = 26
26 × 2 + 2 = 54, 54 × 2 + 2 = 110

(D) The pattern is as follows
9 × 5 × 3 = 135
5 × 7 × 4 = 140
Similarly, 6 × 5 × 5 = 150
Hence, number 5 will come in place of question mark.

(C) As, (4 + 1/5) = 21/5
and (1 + 1/2) = 3/2
Similarly, 2 + (2/3) = 8/3
Hence, 2/3 will come in place of question mark.

(D) The pattern in clockwise direction is
2³, 3³, 4³, 5³, 6³ and 7³.
∴ ? = 7³ = 343

(C) As, (6 × 8) + 3 = 51
(15 × 4) + 5 = 65
Similarly, (20 × 5) + 20 = 120
Hence, option (c) is the correct answer.

(C) The pattern in the question is
4² + 5² = 16 + 25 = 41, 2² + 1² = 4 + 1 = 5.
7² + 6² = 49 + 36 = 85
Hence option (c) is the correct answer.

(D) Starting from 27 and moving clockwise, the number in alternate segments form the series, 27, 30, 33, 36. The numbers in the remaining segments moving anti-clockwise, form the series as shown below.
?, 21, 23, 25 or 21, 23, 25, ?
